skill.name: weekly-report-generator
skill.description: Generate weekly and monthly reports from work logs, including structured summaries, chart-ready data, and next-month plans.
skill.summary: Turn work logs into structured weekly or monthly reports.
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged weak cryptography at SKILL.md:4 and possible obfuscation at SKILL.md:1. Review found no cryptographic code, executable logic, encoded payload, network use, filesystem access, or prompt injection. Both static findings are false positives from short non-English Markdown frontmatter.

content.user_title: Create Weekly Reports from Work Logs
content.value_statement: Teams often turn scattered work notes into reports by hand. This skill helps Claude, Codex, or Claude Code format logs into weekly or monthly reports with progress, highlights, chart-ready data, and plans.
actual_capabilities: Summarizes raw work logs into structured weekly or monthly reports.
Organizes accomplishments, progress, blockers, and next steps.
Creates chart-ready data summaries from supplied activity notes.
Drafts next-month plans based on completed work and open items.
Supports report writing for individuals, freelancers, small businesses, and teams.
limitations: It depends on the accuracy and detail of the work logs provided.
It does not verify project status against external systems unless data is supplied.
Charts may be described or prepared as data when the host tool cannot render graphics.
Important business claims should be reviewed by a person before sharing.

use_cases.title: Prepare a personal weekly report
use_cases.description: Convert daily task notes into a clear report for a manager or team lead.

use_cases.title: Summarize freelance client work
use_cases.description: Turn billable activity notes into a professional weekly or monthly client update.

use_cases.title: Create team status updates
use_cases.description: Combine team member logs into a concise status report with progress, blockers, and plans.

prompt_templates.title: Basic weekly report
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a weekly report from these work logs. Include completed work, current progress, blockers, and next week plans.

prompt_templates.title: Monthly report with highlights
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a monthly report from these logs. Group work by project, highlight measurable results, and add a brief executive summary.

prompt_templates.title: Team report with chart-ready data
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a team weekly report from these member updates. Include a summary, key outcomes, risks, owners, and chart-ready data for task categories.

prompt_templates.title: Executive report and next-month plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an executive monthly report from these work logs. Include achievements, business impact, risks, decisions needed, and a next-month action plan.

output_examples.input: Daily notes from a product manager covering roadmap meetings, release planning, and blocked decisions.
output_examples.output: A structured weekly report with summary, completed work, active priorities, blockers, and next-week plan.

output_examples.input: Freelance development notes with tasks, hours, fixes, and client feedback.
output_examples.output: A client-ready monthly update with delivered work, open items, impact summary, and planned next steps.

output_examples.input: Team updates from design, engineering, and operations.
output_examples.output: A combined status report with team highlights, risk areas, owner assignments, and chart-ready activity totals.

best_practices: Provide dated work logs with project names, outcomes, and blockers.
State the audience and desired tone before generating the report.
Review metrics, dates, and business claims before sending the final report.
anti_patterns: Do not provide vague notes without dates, owners, or outcomes.
Do not use the output as the only source for legal, financial, or HR decisions.
Do not include confidential client or employee data unless the AI workspace is approved for it.

faq.question: What input does this skill need?
faq.answer: It works best with dated work logs, task lists, project notes, blockers, and planned next steps.

faq.question: Can it create monthly reports too?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill description supports weekly and monthly report generation from supplied work logs.

faq.question: Does it connect to project management tools?
faq.answer: No evidence found for direct integrations. Paste or provide the relevant project data in the prompt.

faq.question: Can it generate charts?
faq.answer: It can prepare chart-ready summaries from provided data. Rendering depends on the host AI tool and available features.

faq.question: Is the output ready to send?
faq.answer: Usually it needs a human review for dates, metrics, names, and sensitive business details.

faq.question: Which tools are supported?
faq.answer: The skill metadata lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
